accurate.why: The description of the rule's content (modifying emission standards to reduce ozone and particulate matter) is accurate real-world context about what the EPA rule does.

no_hallucinations.why: The description of the rule's effect is accurate real-world context; the EPA heavy-duty vehicle rule (88 Fed. Reg. 4296) did address ozone and particulate matter standards.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the resolution nullifies the identified EPA rule.

exceptions_conditions.why: No material exceptions in the bill.

effective_dates.why: No separate effective date; omission appropriate.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the essential effect: nullifying the identified EPA rule, with helpful real-world context about the rule's content.

concise.why: Very concise summary appropriate for a brief CRS note.

correct_figures.why: 88 Fed. Reg. 4296 and January 24, 2023 correctly stated.
